title: The Leonardo Collection LP52751 Christmas Forest Family Deer Mugs (Set of 2), Fine China, Boxed
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 2 Ceramic Mugs with Forest Family design 11x8 cm - 0.38 kg
WATERCOLOR DESIGN: These delicate and seasonal mugs feature watercolored paintings of a lovely deer family resting in a snowy forest by Jennifer Rose.
LOVELY GIFT IDEA FOR THE HOLIDAYS: Relish the yuletide season with these fancy mugs that will add the finishing touch to your holiday decorations.
HIGH QUALITY: Enjoy your coffee or tea with these high-quality and seasonally designed mugs made from fine china.
WITH GIFT BOX: These mugs come with a gift box making it the perfect gift idea for the holidays.
description: Enjoy your coffee or tea with this high-quality and seasonally designed mugs.
